purpose_context: #2651 minted mission_type and action nodes as first-class DRG elements but deferred their edges, leaving 8 orphaned nodes and a red shipped-graph orphan gate. This mission completes the minimal-correct wiring — each mission type requires its ordered action steps — so the graph reflects the real composition, the charter cascade for mission types becomes meaningful, and the orphan count returns under its ceiling. Template/asset/guard edges remain deliberate future scope.
purpose_tldr: Wire mission_type DRG nodes to their action steps so the mission-type graph is edge-complete and the shipped-graph orphan gate is green.
